message:
🌱 Add kong: kong migrations bootstrap failure with postgres 14 mission (#1579)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kong-8259-kong-migrations-bootstrap-failure-with-postgres-14",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kong: kong migrations bootstrap failure with postgres 14",
+    "description": "kong migrations bootstrap failure with postgres 14. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kong troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kong deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kong\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kong -n kong --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kong configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kong configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kong\nkubectl get configmap -n kong -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kong\n```\n### Is there an existing issue for this?\n\n- [X] I have searched the existing issues\n\n### Kong version (`$ kong version`)\n\nlatest\n\n### Current Behavior\n\nError: module 'openssl.rand' not found:No LuaRocks module found for openssl.rand\n\tno field"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for kong migrations bootstrap failure with postgres 14",
+        "description": "I fixed it by installing luaossl library.\nIt's a workaround for you . I will be working this problem, seems something went wrong with pgmoon.\nhttps://github.com/mayocream/kong-tests/blob/f6396b97e231ee409edf9bb75084dff2237219ab/issues/8259/docker-compose.yml\n\nAdd below parts to docker-compose.yml,\n```yaml\napk add curl git gcc musl-dev\nluarocks install luaossl OPENSSL_DIR=/usr/local/kong CRYPTO_DIR=/usr/local/kong\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm kong migrations bootstrap failure with postgres 14 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kong -n kong --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kong --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I fixed it by installing luaossl library.\nIt's a workaround for you . I will be working this problem, seems something went wrong with pgmoon.\nhttps://github.com/mayocream/kong-tests/blob/f6396b97e231ee409edf9bb75084dff2237219ab/issues/8259/docker-compose.yml\n\nAdd below parts to docker-compose.yml, restoring normal.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apk add curl git gcc musl-dev\nluarocks install luaossl OPENSSL_DIR=/usr/local/kong CRYPTO_DIR=/usr/local/kong",
+        "> apk add curl git gcc musl-dev\n> luarocks install luaossl OPENSSL_DIR=/usr/local/kong CRYPTO_DIR=/usr/local/kong\n>",
+        "version: \"3.8\"\n\nservices:\n  kong-migrations:\n    image: kong:2.7.0\n    command: kong migrations bootstrap\n    environment:\n      KONG_PROXY_ERROR_LOG: /dev/stderr\n      KONG_PG_USER: kong\n      KONG_PG_DATABASE: kong\n      KONG_PG_PASSWORD: <REDACTED>\n      KONG_PG_HOST: db\n    depends_on:\n    - db\n\n  db:\n    image: postgres:14\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: <REDACTED>\n      POSTGRES_USER: kong\n\n  kong:\n    image: kong:2.7.0\n    environment:\n      KONG_PROXY_ERROR_LOG: /dev/stderr\n      KONG_PG_USER: kong\n      KONG_PG_DATABASE: kong\n      KONG_PG_PASSWORD: <REDACTED>\n      KONG_PG_HOST: db\n    depends_on:\n    - kong-migrations"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kong",
+      "community",
+      "api-gateway",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kong installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
